vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My parents gave me a sophisticated watch to mark a milestone when I graduated from university.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm thay cho lời cảm ơn/sự trân trọng
vocab.example: I received a sleek digital watch as a token of appreciation from my company after completing a major project.

vocab.meaning: trân trọng tâm ý/cử chỉ tốt đẹp
vocab.example: Even though the watch was quite simple, I truly cherish the gesture because it came from my younger brother.

vocab.meaning: người tặng quà hào phóng / ân nhân
vocab.example: An uncle of mine, who is a generous benefactor, surprised me with a luxury timepiece on my 21st birthday.

vocab.meaning: vết khắc theo yêu cầu (tên, ngày kỷ niệm...)
vocab.example: The watch I got as a gift is unique because it has a customized engraving of my initials on the back.
I view a watch as the perfect commemorative gift because it lasts for years and carries so many memories.

vocab.meaning: sự bất ngờ không lường trước được
vocab.example: Receiving a high-end smartwatch was an unexpected surprise that I didn't see coming at all.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp trường tồn với thời gian
vocab.example: The vintage watch I was gifted has a timeless appeal that never goes out of style regardless of current trends.

vocab.meaning: một món đồ sở hữu quý giá
vocab.example: That gold watch has become a prize possession of mine, and I only wear it on extremely formal occasions.
It was such a thoughtful present; my friend remembered that I had been wanting a waterproof watch for swimming.
